content: Hey there, I am Onur(ozkanonur at github) from The Rust Language Organization. I have some free days which I thought I can spend some time on this project. I am pretty familiar with the kernel upstream, which also had a patch(easy-small one) few years ago. Is it okay if I take a look on https://github.com/Rust-for-Linux/linux/issues/396 this task list?

Yes, of course! Please feel free to do so, and thanks for asking! Note that the .rust-toolchain.toml PR was rejected by upstream recently. The betas issue is not critical, but a nice to have that came from the days we used them sporadically in the GitHub CI. In case you are interested in other things besides rustup, we have other task lists (please see #2 for the list of lists).

Thank you for providing the answer! https://github.com/Rust-for-Linux/linux/issues/2 seems comprehensive enough guide/task-ref for me. This project has been on my mind for some time, finally got some free time to get involved with the codebase.
